judgment.summary: Profitable, growing financial services firm with solid returns and a reasonable valuation.
judgment.earningsRecap: Last quarter beat EPS estimate by 13.7%; next earnings date is 2026-07-15.
positives: Earnings growth 31.9% YoY and quarterly earnings growth 29.0% indicate strong performance.
Profit margin 24.8% and return on equity 16.4% demonstrate healthy profitability and efficiency.
Forward P/E of 15.57x is attractive given the growth prospects.
Consensus 'buy' rating from 21 analysts with a mean target above the current price.
Total cash of $663.30B provides significant liquidity.
negatives: Debt/Equity ratio of 502.25 is exceptionally high, though common in the financial sector.
Price/Sales (TTM) of 4.26x is on the higher side.
Beta of 1.21 suggests higher volatility than the broader market.

news.paragraph: Morgan Stanley is involved in multiple high-profile activities, including being named a stabilization agent and participating in discussions around AI deals. The firm also recently saw its price target increased on NextEra Energy, signaling positive analyst sentiment within its coverage. These developments suggest active engagement in significant financial and strategic transactions.

headlines.title: Evercore's Kiely, Morgan Stanley's Cheng Talk AI Deals
Morgan Stanley Increases NextEra Energy (NEE) Price Target to $115 amid Dominion Energy Deal
